name: The Island of Thugs
short_description: Welcome to the isalnd of thugs. This tropical island is a secret military base of Russian PMC. You are a Special Agent who must find the leader of PMC and eliminate him. Take the gun and let's go!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the isalnd of thugs. This tropical island is a secret military base of the Russian PMC. You are a Special Agent who must find the leader of PMC and eliminate him. Take the gun and let's go!

Key Features:

  • Realistic Shooting Mechanics: Bullet drop and recoil are essential mechanics that enhance realism.

  • Dynamic Levels: Diverse locations with cover, traps, and interactive elements.

  • Intelligent Enemy AI: Smart opponents with various tactics and behaviors.

  • Destructible Environments: Ability to destroy objects to get advantages.
about_the_game:

supported_languages:
English*, Ukrainian, Spanish - Spain, Russian
*languages with full audio support
